import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
let n = tokens.len()
while i < n
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    if t == "next"
      state = next(state)
    end
  when None
    state = state
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(label(state))
